title: selaginella rupestris
intro: Selaginella rupestris, also known as the rocky spikemoss, is a type of fern-like plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and infections. Some of the health benefits associated with Selaginella rupestris include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and effects.
